note: exp025 v1 = exp24 self-play train_league (cg_* clipped-Gaussian dist + winrate-gated league + capped F=256 env, ALL verbatim) + v41 model (OrbitNet19 E=128 n_layers=6 n_heads=4 + SimpleFracMLP[emb||emb_tid||gemb]). RANDOM init (NO IL warm-start; the IL-on/off switch is just whether --init_from is passed). n_heads=4 confirmed (v41 rl_infer Hh=4 d=32 produced a sensible 0.85-vsOL eval -> agent_meta's n_heads=8 is a stale copy-paste, contradicted by the working deploy). Config: ent=0.02 lr=1e-4 save_every=500 max_admit_interval=20000 admit_min_games=1024 admit_thresh=0.70 min_admit_u=1000 updates=550000 n_envs=512 mb=32. ckpts -> ckpts/ subdir; logs (sp_train.log, sp_league.log) with scripts at run root. numpy deploy port (rl_infer) to be ported from v41 + GPU-validated AFTER training (Rule 7: no local jax).
